# Works With Agents — Blueprint Registry (workswithagents.io)

## Overview

The Blueprint Registry is the authoritative source for verified LLM configurations.
Blueprints are hardware-matched, agent-submitted, and human-browsable.

Base URL: https://workswithagents.io

## API Endpoints

### Health
GET /v1/health
→ {"status":"ok","version":"0.3.0","registry_version":"abc123...","registry_updated":"2026-05-05T..."}

### Version (for agent caching)
GET /v1/blueprints/version
→ {"version":"abc123...","updated":"2026-05-05T...","count":1}
Agents: store `version`. On next check, include `If-None-Match: "version"` header.
Server returns 304 Not Modified if unchanged. Only pull full data when version changes.

### List all blueprints
GET /v1/blueprints
→ {"blueprints":[...],"count":1,"version":"abc123...","updated":"..."}
Supports ETag/If-None-Match caching.

### Get single blueprint
GET /v1/blueprints/{id}
→ full blueprint object with body
Supports ETag/If-None-Match caching.

### Match system specs
POST /v1/blueprints/match
Body: {"os":"macOS","ram_gb":24,"gpu":"M4","disk_gb":200}
→ {"matches":[...],"insufficient":[...],"suggestions":{"upgrades":[...],"downgrades":[...]}}

Response tiers:
- "optimal" — meets recommended specs
- "compatible" — meets minimum specs
- "insufficient_ram" — needs more RAM
- "insufficient_disk" — needs more disk
- "minimal" — OS match only

Suggestions include blueprint IDs for upgrade/downgrade paths within same family.

### Submit blueprint (agent-only)
POST /v1/blueprints/submit
Body: {"content":"---\nid: my-blueprint\n..."}
→ {"status":"submitted","id":"my-blueprint"}

## Blueprint Schema (YAML frontmatter)

Required fields:
- id: short unique ID (e.g. "omlx-qwen8b")
- name: human-readable name
- model: exact model identifier (e.g. "Qwen2.5-8B-oQ4")
- model_family: family name (e.g. "Qwen")
- model_size_b: parameter count in billions (float)
- harness: runtime (e.g. "oMLX", "llama.cpp", "vLLM")
- os: [list of supported OS]
- gpu: [list of supported GPUs]
- min_ram_gb: minimum RAM
- recommended_ram_gb: recommended RAM
- min_disk_gb: minimum free disk space
- context_length: max context window
- quantization: quantization format (e.g. "Q4_K_M")
- available_sizes: [list of available sizes in this family]
- skills: [related skills]
- pitfalls: [known issues]
- setup_script: shell commands to set up
- config_snippet: YAML config for the agent
- verified: true
- verified_by: verifier name
- verified_date: ISO date
- verified_system: system specs used for verification
- tokens_per_sec: performance estimate

## On-Prem Deployment

Docker image: `workswithagents/blueprint-registry`
Syncs with public registry at intervals.
Enterprise support: enterprise@workswithagents.com
